retrieved_result: Why do weather people still use green screens? Vicky's answer is great. Cost/Benefit is one of the main reasons. However, there's other more technical aspects that dictate why greenscreens are still in use. First, the weather person is not working in the dark. (s)He has a monitor in front of him that outputs the rendered video with the weather f
